{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318323717DE89162C613F2EE680"}"},"total":1398},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7299419692245320482","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"剧情紧凑战场精彩叠成，叙事风格精彩，而且还原了三国那个战场纷飞的英雄年代，以别样的故事讲述了三国时代也让人更新颖的了解了三国我超级喜欢，这是我第二遍听读！点赞点赞"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1699529663,"group_id":"7194272889741249573","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwGwC+cZHoNosLAUnpQPjaLH+VpqPN+M7ASMlCes0J6k","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3281400999190784","user_name":"用户32814009"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3281400999190784","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7194272889741249573","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统】+【不无脑】+【文臣武将】+【非小白文】
【慢热型传统历史文，喜欢无脑爽文的谨慎观看。】
...
武靖穿越到东汉末年幽州一边陲小县，成为了武家的嫡次子。
依靠着前世的知识，赚取大量钱财，使得武家实力剧增。
恰逢山匪祸乱、乌桓南下，武靖斥巨资招兵买马。
除山匪，抗鲜卑、灭乌桓，扫平黄巾之乱，讨伐董卓。
从此，武靖开始了他的争霸之路。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3cf4babad0334086fd3afd9828924ebe","author":"燕云十八骑","author_id":"","book_id":"7194272889741249573","book_name":"汉末三国：一杆铁戟镇天下","book_short_name":"铁戟定三国","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8e8e8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":67,"name":"三国","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67&name=三国&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7194272930082226725","read_count":"19174","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2370478"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"988","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,三国","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b5c73f950df53f5253b55568ba2cc747~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779445957&x-signature=RfAAEud1dv3XG%2FM0tVA7TDlreQI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2458977819953724","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.1800683e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318323717DE89162C613F2EE680"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读20小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":71,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":40864,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":71908,"reply_count":7,"show_pv":41887},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1699578645,"author_reply_time":1699578647,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7224686672281109248","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的很不错！继续努力！作者对历史细节处理很到位，对当时社会形态了解，对官场有认识…就是主角在现场把控不够敏力，是主角还没成长还是今后就是这样的性格？？？还有，我认为不需要每场战斗都要写的细致，作者细致到小战场都要好几章来描写，我认为没必要，要分主次。主要战争多写，次要战争顶多两章就够了！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1682128512,"group_id":"7194272889741249573","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3EQMYZKndOX6PwHaH4+xs6kJ6pL/k0c1zUpQ/R9LWAe","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3803938762798364","user_name":"爱吃芝士奶茶的玄云"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3803938762798364","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7194272889741249573","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统】+【不无脑】+【文臣武将】+【非小白文】
